features: WAVE GLOW WIRELESS SPEAKER - Whether you're at home, outside or on holiday, always keep the music flowing with the Groov-e Wave Glow, a rechargeable and portable Bluetooth speaker with LED lights that offers an exceptional sound experience

EXCEPTIONAL SOUND - Fall in love with your favourite songs all over again with the help of the 10W speakers that help the portable speaker blast crisp and clear sound for an unparalleled audio experience at home, outdoors or on the go

8HRS OF AUDIO PLAYBACK - The Wave Glow comes with a built-in rechargeable 1200mAh battery that gives you an impressive 8 hours of wireless music playback. Once you're out of juice, just plug in the included USB-C charging cable

BLUETOOTH CONNECTIVITY - Built with Bluetooth, the Wave Glow can connect to any compatible device within the wireless range to easily begin streaming music. Simply connect, hit play, and enjoy the sounds of your choice

LED LIGHTING - Set the right tone with the built-in LED light system that will compliment the powerful sound of the Wave Glow with stunning visuals that will elevate your audio experience, whether taking it easy and relaxing to tunes or partying it up
description: From the manufacturer Bluetooth Connectivity The Wave Glow’s Bluetooth lets you easily connect to any device within range and start streaming music just connect, hit play, and enjoy. 8hr Music Playback The Wave Glow features a rechargeable 1200mAh battery for up to 8 hours of wireless music. When it’s time to recharge, simply plug in the included USB-C cable. LED Lights Set the perfect mood with the built-in LED light system, enhancing the Wave Glow’s powerful sound with stunning visuals—whether you're relaxing or partying.
